description_full:
Mit Sustaind schaffen wir die erste global harmonisierte Gesetzesdatenbank. Unsere B2B-Kunden nutzen diese Daten, um Compliance-Risiken zu minimieren und Rechtspflichten weltweit zu managen. Als einer unserer ersten Customer Success Manager baust du diesen Bereich von Grund auf mit auf. Du bist die Brücke zwischen unseren Kunden und unserer komplexen Datenplattform und sorgst dafür, dass aus Daten echte Rechtssicherheit wird.




Deine Rolle

Du begleitest unsere Kunden nach dem Kauf und stellst sicher, dass sie mit Sustaind langfristig erfolgreich sind. Du denkst in Lösungen, nicht in Support-Tickets:

Onboarding & Implementierung: Du führst Neukunden in unsere Plattform ein und hilfst ihnen, die Datenlogik für ihre spezifischen Anwendungsfälle zu verstehen.
Aufbau Customer Success: Du entwickelst Prozesse, Playbooks und Dokumentationen, um die Skalierung unseres Kundenstamms zu ermöglichen.
Schnittstelle zur Produktentwicklung: Du übersetzt Kundenfeedback und fachliche Anforderungen (z.B. neue Länderwünsche oder Datenfelder) direkt an unsere Data Engineers.
Retention & Expansion: Du erkennst Potenziale für Upsells und sorgst durch eine hohe Kundenzufriedenheit für langfristige Vertragsverlängerungen.
Daten-Expertise: Du hilfst Kunden dabei, unsere API oder Datenexporte optimal in ihre bestehenden GRC-Systeme (Governance, Risk & Compliance) zu integrieren.




Was Du mitbringst

Du liebst es, komplexe Produkte zu erklären und Prozesse zu strukturieren:

Erfahrung im B2B SaaS: Du hast bereits im Customer Success, Account Management oder technischen Consulting gearbeitet.
Technisches Grundverständnis: Du musst kein Coder sein, aber Begriffe wie APIs, Datenmodelle und JSON schrecken dich nicht ab. Du verstehst, wie Daten fließen.
Struktur & Aufbau-Mentalität: Du hast Lust, Prozesse (wie CRM-Logiken oder Help-Center) neu zu gestalten, statt dich in gemachte Nester zu setzen.
Kommunikationstalent: Du kannst komplexe juristische oder technische Sachverhalte einfach und überzeugend erklären (Deutsch & Englisch).
Analytisches Denken: Du verstehst die Business-Logik von Großunternehmen und wie unsere Gesetzesdaten dort echten ROI erzeugen.




Was Dich erwartet

Du wirst Teil eines kleinen, schlagkräftigen Teams, in dem Ergebnisse zählen und der Kunde im Mittelpunkt steht:

Mitgestaltung: Du prägst die Customer Journey eines stark wachsenden Legal-Tech Startups entscheidend mit.
Remote-first Kultur: Flexibles Arbeiten von wo du willst, mit einem festen Ankerpunkt in Bielefeld.
Echtes Produkt: Du verkaufst keine Vision, sondern ein funktionierendes Produkt mit namhaften Kunden.
Stabilität & Growth: Finanzierung durch Umsatz und Top-Investoren sichert deinen Arbeitsplatz und unser Wachstum.
Team-Spirit: Regelmäßige Offsites (Lissabon, Porto, Fuerteventura), um gemeinsam abzuschalten und Strategien zu schmieden.

The Role

World Wide Marketing at AMD is looking to hire an A-player to help create, own and drive Marketing’s budgeting and funding process. This function stretches across all the business units as well as multiple functions at AMD. You will help coordinate a fast-paced super collaborate team of individuals who are passionate about their work and thrive on guaranteeing the best ROI for AMD. Your function will range from supporting a highly functioning/collaborative team while ensuring budget accuracy, managing/creating metrics and helping direct marketing spend strategy. You will have the opportunity to interact with P/L owners, GM’s, finance/HR/Ops, external partners and sales/marketing leaders across the globe.

If operational excellence, data, metrics and soft skills appeal to you this role will help you expand. You will be surrounded by a team that will help build, support and provide multiple development opportunities for you.

The Person

To be successful in this role, you must be comfortable with change, able to manage challenging deadlines, and an effective communicator who can innovate on the fly. Budget communication: Clearly and effectively communicate funding allocations and budget movements in a timely and accurate manner.
Cross‑functional alignment: Collaborate proactively with cross‑functional internal AMD teams to ensure seamless processes and strong stakeholder alignment.
Financial close and reconciliation: Coordinate month‑end, quarter‑end and year-end close activities, including reporting and reconciliation. Provide high‑quality quarter‑end and year-end reports to stakeholders, ensuring on‑time delivery, accuracy, and completeness.
Language requirement: Fluency in English, both verbal and written, is required.

description_full:
Junior Project Manager – Solar PV (EPC)




Location: Berlin, Germany (4 days per week on-site)

Department: EPC (Engineering, Procurement & Construction)




About the Role




We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Junior Project Manager to join our EPC team in Berlin. This role offers an excellent opportunity to develop hands-on experience in delivering solar PV rooftop projects (<1 MW) across both residential (multi-family/apartment buildings) and commercial & industrial (C&I) sectors.




Working closely with senior Project Managers, you will support the full project lifecycle—from early-stage concept and design coordination through to construction and O&M handover.




Key Responsibilities

Support the delivery of solar PV rooftop projects (sub-1 MW) across residential and C&I sectors
Assist in managing projects through all phases: feasibility, design, procurement, construction, commissioning, and handover
Coordinate with internal teams (engineering, procurement, construction) and external stakeholders (clients, contractors, suppliers)
Track project timelines, budgets, and milestones, ensuring delivery within scope
Support permitting and regulatory processes where required
Help manage contractor performance and site activities alongside senior PMs
Prepare project documentation, reports, and updates for internal and external stakeholders
Assist with risk identification and mitigation throughout project execution
Support the transition of completed projects to Operations & Maintenance (O&M) teams




Requirements

1–3 years of experience in project coordination or project management (renewables, construction, or energy preferred)
Degree in Engineering, Renewable Energy, Construction Management, or a related field
Strong organisational and communication skills
Ability to manage multiple tasks and work in a fast-paced environment
Basic understanding of solar PV systems and EPC project workflows is a plus
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Project, PowerPoint); familiarity with project management tools is advantageous
Fluent in English; German is highly desirable




What We Offer

Opportunity to work on impactful renewable energy projects in a growing market
Structured development with mentorship from experienced Project Managers
Exposure to end-to-end EPC project delivery
Collaborative and international working environment
Flexible working model (4 days in-office, Berlin)
Salary up to €75,000 Salary + Bonus/Package

description_full:
The Sale & Campaign Management Team is responsible for the planning and execution of sale campaigns across all ABOUT YOU markets, for the development and testing of new campaign ideas, and for the integration of new campaign-related technical features. The projects handled by the team are managed across multiple stakeholders within ABOUT YOU, always seeking excellent collaboration and the best outcome to shape an innovative, effective, and flexible campaign landscape, which contributes to our revenue and strategic goals.

As Junior Project Manager Commercial (all genders), you will take over smaller projects independently and support larger topics within the Sale & Campaign Management Team, e.g., process optimization for cross-team collaboration or development of innovative campaign communications. Within this role, you essentially contribute to the success of the Sale & Campaign Management team and the development and growth of ABOUT YOU.

Responsibilities


Manage smaller projects end-to-end and support larger initiatives within the Sale & Campaign Management Team
 Drive projects from ideation to implementation, including performance tracking and analysis
 Monitor market trends and derive relevant insights for campaign planning and execution
 Collaborate with multiple stakeholders across different business areas to align on concepts, timelines, and processes
 Contribute to the development of innovative campaign communication approaches and new technical solutions 


Requirements


Degree in Business Administration, Economics, or a related field
 First experience in project management and/or e-commerce
 Good project management and communication skills with a hands-on mentality
 Proactive mindset with the ability to quickly understand complex topics
 Analytical thinking and a solution-oriented approach to decision-making
 Excellent communication skills in English, German is a plus 


Benefits


 Hybrid working 
 Fresh fruit every day 
 Sports courses 
 Exclusive employee discounts 
 Free drinks 
 Language courses 
 Company parties 
 Mobility subsidy 
 Central Location 
 Flexible Working Hours 
 Company pension 
 Professional training 
 Dog-friendly office 
 AY Academy 
 Feedback Culture 
 Job Bikes 


You Are The Core Of ABOUT YOU

We take responsibility for creating an inclusive and exceptional environment where all genders, nationalities and ethnicities feel welcomed and accepted exactly as they are. We believe that a diverse workforce essentially contributes to the ABOUT YOU culture. In order to maintain talent and diversity, we emphasize the care for physical health, mental health and overall well-being. Our values and work ethics essentially contribute to our brand mission: empower acceptance and shape an inclusive, fair and circular fashion culture.

Because of our strong growth, new challenges and possibilities arise all along to further develop oneself and the company. Our team consists of people from different areas of expertise – fashion, marketing, business and tech – we are driven and united by our passion. We motivate and support each other, we share our know-how and we are open towards different opinions and new ideas.

We are looking forward to receiving your application – preferably via our online application portal! Thus, we can ensure a faster process and for you it is very easy to upload your application documents.

description_full:
Job Description

As Consultancy Project Manager, you support the Commercial Printing business for Continuous Feed (CF) and Sheetfed Presses (SP) within the Developing Regions Business Group. Based in Poing, you work closely with Regional Sales Organizations (RSOs) in the Middle East, Turkey, South Africa, Central Eastern Europe and Central Northern Africa, as well as with partners and distributors in several regions.

In this role, you combine technical expertise, structured project management and customer-oriented consultancy. You support sales projects from the early concept phase through implementation and acceptance, ensuring solutions are technically sound, commercially viable and aligned with customer needs.

Responsibilities


Support Area Managers during the offer phase by defining technical solutions, e.g. selecting press configurations, options and workflows for customer proposals
Develop technical concepts and system layouts, including configuration of Continuous Feed and Sheetfed presses
Work with Regional Sales Organizations and distributors to manage customer projects, from initial concept through implementation and acceptance
Provide consultancy on applications and production processes, e.g. advising customers on optimal setups for specific print jobs
Support print tests and cost calculations, including preparation, execution and evaluation of results
Contribute to service-related activities, such as coordinating training, supporting installations, handling escalations and preparing documentation
Support after-sales and service processes, including warranty topics, remote service and technical follow-up
Participate in product demonstrations and customer presentations, providing technical explanations and support


Qualifications

Your profile


Bachelor’s or University degree in a technical discipline or relevant education (e.g. Technician; “Ausbildung Techniker / Eletroniker”
Solid knowledge of commercial printing technologies
Experience in a large, international organisation, preferably in technical sales, consultancy or business development
Structured, analytical working style and strong problem-solving skills
Fluent English and good understanding of German language
Willingness to travel internationally


Competencies 


Act as a Team Player
Apply Business Acumen
Communicate effectively
Apply Strategic Thinking
Create Solutions to Problems
Drive & Manage Change
Focus on the Customer
Negotiate & Influence


About Us

Canon is a world-leading imaging company and a global brand - driven to enrich people’s lives and businesses with innovative products and smart digital solutions. At Canon, we’ve been inspiring people to capture and share their world for over 85 years. As a global leader in imaging and innovation, we’re driven by bold ideas, collaboration, and a commitment to making a positive impact.

With a strong presence across EMEA for over 60 years, our regional HQs in London and Amstelveen support operations in 120+ markets. We’re proud of our diverse, inclusive culture and our philosophy of Kyosei – living and working together for the common good.

Why join us?

Canon champions hybrid working with a flexible working policy. You will be part of an energetic and innovative environment with more than 50 different nationalities! Be part of a company that values sustainability and inclusion. Lastly, you’ll find that Canon encourages continuous learning and development with a wide range of resources and support available on demand.

If you’re visionary, innovative, and ready to make an impact – we’d love to hear from you. Even if you don't meet all the qualifications we still encourage you to apply.

With Canon, you'll get the support and encouragement you need to grow from people who share your ambition. We'll invest in your professional development to help you learn and progress in your role with us. You'll find leaders who give you the freedom to explore new things and a team where knowledge is shared openl

Was Uns So Besonders Macht


Wir befürworten betriebliche Altersvorsorge und bezuschussen diese mit 20% ab dem 1. Arbeitstag
Wir finanzieren für Dich eine betriebliche Krankenversicherung zur Reduzierung Deiner zusätzlichen Kosten im Krankheitsfall, für Vorsorgeleistungen oder Hilfsmittel (Gesetzlich- und Privatversicherte)
Weitere individuelle Zusatzleistungen optimieren Dein Gehalt
Wir unterstützen Dich als Elternteil durch die Erstattung der Differenz zum Kinderkrankengeld in den ersten beiden Krankheitstagen des Kindes
Wir bieten Dir mit unserer Corporate Benefits-App ein kostengünstiges Einkaufserlebnis bei einer Auswahl aus über 800 Top-Marken
Wir bieten Dir Maßnahmen zur Gesundheitsförderung und Mobilität, z.B. mit unserem Jobrad-Angebot
Wir setzen auf eine langfristige Zusammenarbeit in Verbindung mit einem vertrauensvollen und respektvollen Umgang
Wir bieten Dir die Möglichkeit zur strategischen und persönlichen Weiterbildung und Entwicklung
Wir tragen durch flexible Arbeitszeiten und Remote-Arbeit zu Deiner Work-Life-Balance bei
Wir erhalten Top-Bewertungen durch unsere Mitarbeitenden (87% Weiterempfehlung in den letzten 12 Monaten und einen Score von 4,3 auf Kununu)


Seit 1989 bietet die CompuSafe Data Systems AG, Teil der audius-Gruppe, maßgeschneiderte IT-Services und IT-Transformation für Unternehmenskunden in langfristigen, partnerschaftlichen Geschäftsbeziehungen. Unser tiefes Verständnis der Herausforderungen und Prozesse unserer Kunden ermöglicht es uns, zielgenaue Lösungen für deren komplexe Probleme anzubieten.

Im Rahmen unserer IT-Services bieten wir Leistungen entlang der Wertschöpfungskette Consult-Design-Build-Operate-Manage (CD-BOM). Schwerpunkte bilden unter anderem Projektmanagement sowie Unterstützung bei Applikations- und Rechenzentrumsbetrieb.

Die IT-Transformation ist unser zweites bedeutendes Kompetenzfeld. Hier spielt die Ablösung von Legacy Applications und der Umstieg auf 5G eine wesentliche Rolle. Zentrales unterstützendes Element ist dabei die IT-Workforce Transformation. Damit adressieren wir auch das Problem des immer größer werdenden Fachkräftemangels bei uns und unseren Kund:innen.

Bei allen Projekten und Services legt CompuSafe größten Wert auf Rechtssicherheit und Compliance.

Bei uns spielen Geschlecht, sexuelle Orientierung, Herkunft, Hautfarbe, Glaube, Alter etc. keine Rolle. Was für uns wirklich wichtig ist, sind Menschen, die Freude an ihrer Arbeit haben, leidenschaftlich für ihre Interessen eintreten und für die gegenseitiger Respekt und Wertschätzung ebenso bedeutend sind wie für uns.

With the support of your manager, you will actively participate in ongoing projects:


 Creation of Power BI reports to improve data transparency,
 Supporting automation and Power Apps projects in all areas of logistics,
 Managing digitalization projects across various teams,
 Performing simulations, validations and sensitivity analysis for finished goods logistics,
 Leading workshops focused on improving process efficiency.



Requirements:


 Fluent English,
 Power Platform or Python skills are a big plus,
 SAP knowledge is a plus,
 Affinity for working with data,
 Good communication skills and high level of commitment,
 Team-oriented and proactive thinking,
 Students specializing in data science, project management, logistics or similar.



Please send your resume in English.

description_full:
We are looking for a state-of-the-art project manager & planning to enable ultimate market success of power electronics solutions developed by the Team Nürnberg Power Electronics Innovation Lab.

Your Responsibilities


Develop and maintain integrated project schedules (from concept to industrialization) including work breakdown structure, milestones and critical path for power electronics projects
Coordinate project planning with hardware, control, mechanical, test and industrialization engineers, ensuring dependencies and interfaces are clearly defined
Monitor progress versus plan, manage risks and issues and implement mitigation plans to secure schedule, cost and quality targets
Organize and lead regular project review meetings, consolidate status reports and present progress, risks, and decisions to stakeholders and to the management
Manage change requests (scope, requirements, design changes) and assess their impact on timing, cost, and resources for power electronics projects
Ensure project documentation, configuration baselines and gate deliverables are complete and compliant with internal processes and customer requirements
Coordinate with purchasing, suppliers, and manufacturing to secure material availability, prototype, and ramp-up for series production of power electronic products
Contribute to continuous improvement of project management methods, planning standards and reporting tools 



Your Qualifications & Skills


Degree in electrical engineering, power electronics, industrial engineering or similar technical field
Several years of experience in project planning or project management in an R&D, industrial environment or consulting, ideally related to power electronics or related high-tech products
Strong analytical and organizational skills, with the ability to build realistic schedules and resource plans
Ability to handle multiple projects in parallel and manage priorities in a dynamic technical environment
Proactive problem‑solving and risk management mindset with focus on on‑time delivery
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, German and/or Italian as a plus


OUR COMMITMENT


Innovative work environment in a young, dynamic team
High-tech projects in the future-proof sector of e-mobility
Opportunities for advancement in a growing company
A wide range of further training opportunities
Attractive bonus system and performance-related pay
Additional company benefits 


WHY ALPITRONIC

Together with our customers, we are driving the world towards sustainable mobility – with cutting-edge technology, we inspire with the most innovative and reliable solutions. With our roots in South Tyrol, we are market and innovation leaders and set the future charging infrastructure standards from our locations in Bolzano/Bozen, Bergamo, Bologna, Munich and Charlotte (USA). 

WHAT MAKES WORKING FOR US SPECIAL

We are excited to meet individuals who are enthusiastic about making things happen, take personal responsibility and appreciate seeing the direct results of their work in the final product. We are a fast-growing company and offer our top teams a diverse and challenging range of tasks in a respectful corporate culture. Your contributions matter, are appreciated and have a significant impact! Join us and be part of our team!

description_full:
Standort: Kiel, Germany

We Say HI*

PMO Specialist, Schwerpunkt Earned Value Management (w/m/d) 

(R0321158)

Thales ist ein weltweit führender Anbieter von Spitzentechnologien für die Bereiche Verteidigung, Luft- und Raumfahrt sowie Cyber Security und Digital Identity.

In Kiel und Wilhelmshaven erwarten Sie moderne und maßgeschneiderte Marinesysteme für Über- und Unterwasserschiffe – von der Kommunikation und Navigation über die Aufklärung bis hin zu Führung und Wirkung. Hier sind Sie richtig, wenn Sie gemeinsam mit uns Geräte und Subsysteme zu einer sicheren Kommunikationslösung integrieren wollen oder an der Entwicklung von Führungs- und Waffeneinsatzsystemen – das ist das Gehirn eines Kriegsschiffes –arbeiten wollen. Werden Sie Teil des Thales-Expertenteams für maritime Lösungen. Wir freuen uns auf Sie!

Ihre Mission als PMO Specialist:


Sie übernehmen eigenständig planerische Aufgaben für das Project Management Offce (PMO), z.B. Training und Coaching in Bezug auf Prozesse, Methoden und Tools oder Durchführung von Risk Assesments und Lessons Learnt Workshops
Termin-, Ressourcen- und Aufwandsplanung für Angebote und Projekte
Analyse von Earned Value- und Meilenstein-Trend-Analyse
Unterstützung der Projektleiter/innen bei der Erstellung von Projektplänen und Erarbeitung von Maßnahmen zur Effizienz- und Effektivitätssteigerung
Aufbau und Ausbau von Ablaufplänen während des gesamten Angebotsprozesses gemeinsam mit dem Bid Management



Darauf freuen wir uns:


Erfolgreich abgeschlossenes technisches oder wirtschaftswissenschaftliches Studium oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation
Mehrjährige Erfahrung im Projektmanagement und klassischen Projektmanagement-Methoden (sehr gute Kenntnisse im Earned Value Management sind obligatorisch)
Eine Zertifizierung (IPMA Level C oder vergleichbar, z.B. PMI oder Prince II) bzw. die Bereitschaft, diese zu erwerben
Idealerweise Kenntnisse in der Anwendung der Projektmanagement-Software Primavera und/oder MS Project
Fließende Deutsch- und Englisch-Kenntnisse in Wort und Schrift



Thales investiert jährlich mehr als 4 Milliarden Euro in Forschung und Entwicklung in Schlüsseltechnologien wie künstliche Intelligenz, Cybersicherheit, Quanten- und Cloud-Technologien.

Im Jahr 2024 erwirtschaftete die Gruppe einen Umsatz von 20,6 Milliarden Euro.

Für mehr als 83.000 Mitarbeitende in 68 Ländern eröffnen wir zukunftsweisende Perspektiven, verwirklichen individuelle Karrierewege und ermöglichen kreative Freiräume. Dies gelingt durch Mut, Vielfalt und den festen Willen, die anspruchsvollen Herausforderungen unserer Zeit sicherer und inklusiver zu gestalten. Mit unserer nachhaltigen, werteorientierten Personalführung treten wir aktiv für Diversität ein.

Wenn die Zeichen der Zeit auf Veränderung stehen, sind unsere internationalen Teams da, um der Komplexität von heute mit den branchenführenden Technologien von morgen zu begegnen. Sind Sie dabei? Ihr Ansprechpartner Andre Fuhrmann freut sich schon auf Ihre Online-Bewerbung über unser Karriereportal.

Andre Fuhrmann – Talent Acquisition Partner

+49 7156 / 302 - 22002

description_full:
About Ava www.thinkava.com 




You’ll play a key role in driving operational excellence within a global organisation that values collaboration, ownership, and continuous improvement. This is an opportunity to make real impact while growing your international logistics career.




Ava Global Logistics is a leading provider of secure logistics solutions, specialising in the global transportation of high-value assets, including banknotes, refined and unrefined precious metals, and other precious commodities. Committed to innovation, efficiency, and uncompromising security, Ava Global Logistics partners with some of the world's most trusted institutions to deliver secure, tailored and reliable logistics solutions. 




As we continue to grow and expand, this evolution creates exciting opportunities to build strategic airline partnerships and develop innovative airfreight solutions to support the specialised markets we service. 




We’re hiring: Global Director Supply Management Valuables-in-Transit

Preferred location: UK, Germany, or Netherlands

Reporting to: Chief Operating Officer




We are seeking an experienced Global Director of Supply Management – Valuables-in-Transit (VIT) to lead the development and execution of global supplier strategies across our secure logistics network.




This senior leadership role is responsible for managing global relationships with Valuables-in-Transit providers, armored transport companies, and secure logistics partners, ensuring the safe, reliable, and cost-effective movement of cash and valuables worldwide.




Key responsibilities

Develop and implement global VIT supplier and sourcing strategies
Manage relationships with VIT providers, secure storage and secure ground transportation partners and ground handlers globally
Lead contract negotiations and supplier performance management
Ensure compliance with international security, banking, and regulatory requirements
Drive cost optimization, operational excellence, and risk mitigation
Partner with internal teams to support network expansion and supplier capability development
Lead implementations like barcode scanning and physical trackers in countries around the world




What we’re looking for

10+ years’ experience in logistics or secure transportation, with strong exposure to VIT or secure ground transportation
Proven success managing global supplier relationships and contract negotiations
Experience in managing multimillion-dollar logistics procurement budgets
Strong commercial acumen and the ability to influence across global, matrixed organizations
Commitment to security, compliance, and operational excellence




 This is an exciting opportunity to shape global supplier strategy within a fast-growing secure logistics organization, working closely with senior leadership and key international partners.




Why join us

This is an opportunity to play a pivotal role in shaping the future of global valuables-in-transit supply strategy within a growing international organization, working closely with senior leadership and key industry partners. 




If you thrive in a fast-paced, global logistics environment and enjoy building high-impact supplier partnerships, we would love to hear from you.




Apply now and help shape the future of operations globally at Ava.

description_full:
Instone Real Estate ist ein Tochterunternehmen der börsennotierten Instone Group und somit einer der führenden Wohnentwickler Deutschlands. Seit 1991 entwickeln wir bundesweit zukunftsfähige und nachhaltige Stadtquartiere mit Miet- und Eigentumswohnungen – für ein langfristig gutes Leben in den Metropolregionen Deutschlands. In dieser Zeit haben wir mehr als 1,4 Millionen Quadratmeter Wohnfläche geschaffen. Durch partnerschaftliche Zusammenarbeit und einen offenen Dialog setzen wir zukunftsweisende Ideen um, die den vielfältigen Bedürfnissen unserer Kunden gerecht werden. Um unserer Leidenschaft und unserem Anspruch an Qualität zu entsprechen, fokussieren wir uns dabei besonders auf die entstehenden Gemeinschaften vor Ort, die bestehenden Nachbarschaften und den Mehrwert, den wir für alle gemeinsam gestalten können. So realisieren wir nachhaltige Werte und Lebensräume, die ökologische und soziale Maßstäbe setzen und übernehmen Verantwortung für eines der dringlichsten gesellschaftlichen Themen unserer Zeit – der Schaffung von bedarfsgerechtem und lebenswertem Wohnraum.




Der Arbeitssitz ist Köln. Für die Projektlaufzeit ist ein Einsatz in Düsseldorf vorgesehen. 




Sie haben Lust, diese Aufgaben mit uns anzugehen?
Im Team: Umsetzung von Bauvorhaben ab einem Investmentvolumen von 20 Millionen Euro
Optimierung: Führen und Koordination der Auftragnehmer und Gewerke auf der Baustelle
Aufgabenplanung: Projektmanagement nach HOAI LPH 6-8
Prozesssteuerung: Kosten- und Projektcontrolling
Koordination: Mitarbeit bei der Ausschreibung und Vergabe von Bauleistungen

 

Wir haben noch viel vor, daher sollten Sie mitbringen:
Background: Erfolgreich abgeschlossenes Studium in den Bereichen Bauingenieurwesen, Architektur oder Immobilientechnik
Expertise: Berufserfahrung im Bereich schlüsselfertiger Wohnungsbau sowie in der Bauleitung von Großprojekten wünschenswert
Skills: Fundierte Kenntnisse der für den Bau relevanten Normen, Vorschriften und Richtlinien
Feingefühl: Gespür für situations- und personenbezogene angemessene Umgangsweise mit dem Kunden (Erwerber)
IT-Kenntnisse: Souveräner Umgang mit MS Office-Produkten

About AMBOSS

AMBOSS is the copilot for medical professionals, empowering them to provide the best possible care through our learning and clinical decision support tool. Our team brings together care, innovative thinking, and cutting-edge AI medical technology. Our founders launched AMBOSS in 2012 with the goal of creating a tool they wished they had during medical school and clinical practice. Since then, we've grown to over 600 employees and are active in over 180 countries - primarily in Germany and the US. Our offices are located in Berlin, Cologne, New York, Cagliari and Cape Town.

Want to learn more about our culture? Watch our video to explore what makes us unique.

Why can this position be exciting for you?

You will have the opportunity to see and understand the multifaceted operational side of a business like AMBOSS, and to therefore gather important knowledge and a skillset to use as a starting point for your career. The excitement lies in your impact: by clearing the path and creating headspace for our Leadership team, you directly influence our ability to execute big ideas.

You Will


Support in gathering, organizing, and maintaining documentation across various internal processes
Organise presents, offsites, meetings (internal and external)
Provide administrative support in document management, including formatting, signature collection, and archiving
Support the G&A Leadership team in day to day business and any adhoc topics
Help prepare presentations and communications
Coordinate logistics with Office Management, such as room setups, mail handling, and courier services
Handle general administrative tasks (e.g. scanning, filing, printing, and running errands to offices or public authorities)


You Bring


First experience in an office environment (e.g. internship, student job, or vocational training) and especially as a team assistant is a plus
High attention to detail, reliability, and strong organizational skills – even in a fast-paced environment
Comfortable handling repetitive tasks with care and precision
Strong communication skills in both English and German
Basic proficiency with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides, etc.)
A proactive, hands-on mindset and a genuine willingness to learn


You Enjoy


Being hands-on, approachable, and happy to support wherever needed
You are comfortable with an administrative role for at least a year (ideally longer)
You see this role as a chance to learn about a fast-paced business environment and gain first-hand experience within the operational and legal areas of a company
Being are adaptable and open to working on a variety of tasks across different areas
You bring a sense of urgency while maintaining a strong eye for detail
You enjoy supporting others and keeping processes running smoothly to enable everyone to do their best work
